data.title: audit: normalize skogai-caveman `using-tickets` skill
data.description:
Repo: `/home/skogix/.local/src/marketplace/plugins/skogai-caveman`

Create a focused issue for `skills/using-tickets/`.

Scope:

* audit the ticket usage guidance against current `tk` expectations
* check for outdated examples or assumptions
* identify any routing/supporting-file cleanup needed
* ensure the skill still fits the repo-local autonomous workflow cleanly

Done when the remaining work is well scoped for implementation.
